scores.evidence: AGENTS.md plus canonical SAN manifests exist.
Local git exists and a baseline commit is required for full strength.
Resume instructions, decisions, and baseline policy are present.
Runtime manifest and SAN verification scripts are defined.
san_sync, san_preflight, san_topology, sanlock, and san_verify provide rerunnable mutation and audit paths.
Git ignore policy and bounded-node control plane are present.
Topology graph exists and records bounded nodes.
Node budgets are now measurable, with hotspot and split-candidate flags.
Current declared and observed dependencies are aligned.
All declared nodes expose ownership roots, verification entrypoints, and dispersion-readiness fields.
Artifact classes and export boundary rules are explicit.
Outward sharing is inactive and private-by-default classes are declared.

summary: SAN maturity averages 4.00/5 across the current minimum scorecard.

under_specification_findings: Baseline commit exists, but remote collaboration policy is still unset.
recommended_actions: Keep prompt-era artifacts historical and out of the control plane.
Refresh topology and SANLOCK after structural changes.
Maintain repo mirrors through san_sync instead of manual edits.
